Spotify.description: Primary streaming platform in LATAM with the most developed editorial playlist ecosystem.
Spotify.strategy: Spotify for Artists pitch 2 weeks before release, targeting editorial playlists by genre and territory. Supplement with algorithmic playlist seeding via Release Radar and Discover Weekly.
Spotify.pitch_timing: 14 days pre-release via Spotify for Artists

Apple Music.description: Strong editorial curation in LATAM, particularly Mexico and Brazil. Important for playlist adds alongside Spotify.
Apple Music.strategy: Contact Apple Music editorial team with release details, emphasizing exclusivity angles and visual assets. Apple values high-quality artwork and music videos.

Deezer.description: Significant market share in Brazil and Mexico. Editorial team responsive to LATAM pitches.
Deezer.strategy: Submit through Deezer for Creators platform. Emphasize artist story and streaming history on the platform.

Amazon Music.description: Growing market in LATAM, especially Mexico. Editorial team building out LATAM-specific playlists.
Amazon Music.strategy: Submit via Amazon Music for Artists. Highlight Alexa voice-request potential and smart speaker plays.

Claro Música.description: Telcel-bundled platform with strong reach across Mexico, Colombia, and Central America. Key for regional penetration.
Claro Música.strategy: Direct editorial contact for playlist placement. Claro values artist exclusivity and regional relevance.

YouTube Music.description: Largest music consumption platform in LATAM by total users. Editorial playlists increasingly curated.
YouTube Music.strategy: Optimize YouTube for Music with proper metadata, custom thumbnails, and premiere strategy. Contact editorial for playlist inclusion.
